title: aquilegia vulgaris monstr. inversa
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris monstr. inversa, commonly known as the alpine clematis, is a variant of the common columbine plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris monstr. inversa are said to include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, herbal preparations of the plant were made by infusing its flowers or roots in hot water to create teas or tinctures.
